description: Heuristic risk patterns for Windows Explorer shell extensions. Match is case-insensitive on CLSID name, DLL path, or overlay key name.

vendors.name: Baidu Netdisk / 百度网盘
vendors.notes: Icon overlays + context menu often freeze folder views.

vendors.name: WPS Office / 金山 WPS
vendors.notes: Cloud / right-click shell hooks inside explorer.exe.

vendors.name: Sogou Input / 搜狗输入法
vendors.notes: IME modules sometimes load into explorer; lower priority than cloud disks.

vendors.name: 360 Security / 360
vendors.notes: Heavy shell injection on some installs.

vendors.name: Tencent / 腾讯相关
vendors.notes: Varies by product; pattern match only.
